title: Exact Orientation And Area Geometry Checks

solver_reuse.target: orientation/area bad fixed-orientation and bad affine-area-scaling QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed orientation/area rows where exact signed-area replay computes signed_double_area = -1 but the row claims signed_double_area > 0, and exact affine-area replay computes image signed double area 60 while the row claims it equals the source area 12.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional fixed coordinate-geometry rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep projective, differential, and higher-dimensional orientation theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed orientation, signed-area, and barycentric checks as deterministic QF_LRA formulas.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation rather than pack-local Python only.
Route false fixed-orientation and false affine-area-scaling claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas certificates once signed areas are replayed exactly.
Keep projective, differential, and higher-dimensional orientation theorems under Lean horizon until formal proof routes exist.
